minecraft:lore: {"text": "📊 武器等级: ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "Lv.17", "color": "#FFD700", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "⚔ 战斗等级要求: ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "17", "color": "green", "bold": true}]}
{"text":"💥 伤害: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"80-100","color":"red","bold":true}]}
{"text":"☆ 暴击率: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"+2%","color":"gold","bold":true}]}
{"text":"⚡ 攻击速度: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"2.2/秒","color":"aqua","bold":true}]}
{"text":"⚒ 技能: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"星辰护盾 II","color":"#FF00FF","bold":true},{"text":" (右键)","color":"gray","bold":false}]}
{"text":"⚒ 特殊技能: ","color":"white","italic":false,"extra":[{"text":"星辰冲击 II","color":"#FF00FF","bold":true},{"text":" (Shift+右键)","color":"gray","bold":false}]}
{"text": "✨ 特性: ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "永不磨损", "color": "aqua", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "💰 售价：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "无法出售", "color": "red", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "🔧 物品种类：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "武器 (神话)", "color": "#FF00FF", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "🔨 超越时空的终极武器。", "color": "gray", "italic": false}
{"text": "🔨 据说它能切开现实本身。", "color": "dark_purple", "italic": false}
{"text": "🔨 只有最强的战士才能驾驭它。", "color": "#9933FF", "italic": false}
{"text": "技能 - ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "星辰护盾 II", "color": "#FF00FF", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 效果: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "召唤4个护盾球环绕", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 格挡: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "每个护盾抵挡1次攻击", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 反击伤害: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "40点固定伤害", "color": "red", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 回复: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "格挡时恢复8点生命", "color": "green", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 持续时间: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "6.0秒", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 冷却时间: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "8.0秒", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "特殊技能 - ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "星辰冲击 II", "color": "#FF00FF", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 效果: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "释放强大能量波攻击前方敌人", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 伤害: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "200%武器伤害", "color": "red", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 范围: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "前方直线7格", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 冷却时间: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "5.5秒", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
